---
title: "Prerequisites"
pagetitle: "Prerequisites"
---

## Introduction

Welcome to the Mobile Tartu 2026 Transport Data Science workshop! 


## Software

- R (>= 4.3)
- RStudio or VS Code
- Quarto CLI
- Git

## R packages

Install the necessary packages for the workshop using the `pak` package:

```r
install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("tdscience/tartu26")
```

Alternatively, you can install them manually:

```r
install.packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "sf",
  "tmap",
  "osmdata",
  "stats19",
  "stplanr",
  "dodgr",
  "spanishoddata",
  "flowmapblue",
  "mapview",
  "fs",
  "htmlwidgets"
))
```

## Data

We will use open datasets throughout the workshop. All data will be downloadable during the sessions.

## GitHub Account

Please create a GitHub account if you do not already have one.
